💬 对 King 说「最近什么游戏值得买」自动获取 · 数据来源多家平台

📰 游戏快讯

IGN
国产动作肉鸽《鲲歌》试玩前瞻：混乱的爽快感 | IGN 中国“厉不厉害你鲲歌”
IGN
《生化危机 安魂曲》存在一个被删除的章节没玩够
IGN
AI开始会做「游戏实机」之后，开发流程变了假实机的作用 从 Midjourney 到 NanoBanana，再到这次的 GPT-Image2，几乎每一次生图模型的进步，都会在互联网上引发一轮狂欢。最近这段时间，自媒体上铺天盖地的「游戏实机演示」视频就是最直观的例子。当生图能力开始变
IGN
所有搭载了D加密的单机及非VR类游戏均被破解D加密还有用吗
IGN
《姆明：暖心冬日》33分钟实机演示游戏现已发售 当姆明从冬眠中意外惊醒，他平生第一次发现自己孤身一人，置身于一片几乎认不出的陌生天地。冰雪女王为姆明谷熟悉的风光，披上了一层冰霜织成的面纱。起初，小小的姆明只是想找个伴儿，好驱散这恼人的冬天。但他却终究不情不愿地踏上了一场走向
IGN
《心之眼》发布Blacklisted更新并永久降价能打赢复活赛吗
IGN
《黎明行者之血》承认使用AI，但强调游戏内无任何AI资产AI的正确使用方法？
IGN
《Repterra》发售宣传视频为人类夺回世界而战 《Repterra》是一款以恐龙横行的世界为背景的基地建设生存即时战略游戏。管理你的殖民地，同时对抗数量庞大的恐龙大军。培育并驾驭你自己的恐龙，解锁永久升级，为人类夺回世界而战。游戏现已登陆PC平台。
IGN
PC版《全境封锁：曙光》12分钟实机演示在广阔的开放世界中体验全新的独立故事情节 《全境封锁：曙光（The Division Resurgence）》是一款设定在巨大城市开放世界的第三人称RPG射击游戏，玩家将在广阔的开放世界中体验到全新的独立故事情节，以独特的视角经历在《全境封
GA
《劍與遠征：啟程》登陸Steam 免費開玩評價87%好評免費奇幻RPG《劍與遠征：啟程》（AFK Journey）正式登陸Steam平台，距離其手機版推出近兩年後，終於擴展至PC玩家群。遊戲目前在Steam上累積約99則用戶評價，其中87%為正面評價，整體表現不俗。
GA
於舊日弄堂 體驗中式志怪之魅 全滬語配音像素解謎遊戲《銜蝶》今日正式發售斑駁的牆面、吱呀作響的木門、泛黃的尋人啟事，還有從走廊深處傳來、難以分辨的細碎聲響……在民國時期的上海一隅，一段塵封已久的「怪事」正悄然上演。由夫妻檔獨立團隊「包包丁 STUDIO」開發的中式志怪懸疑解謎遊戲《銜蝶》，於今日（4 月 28
GA
《遙遙西土 Far Far West》Steam開售　西部＋蒸汽龐克＋魔法玩法曝光合作射擊PVE獨立遊戲《遙遙西土 Far Far West》已於4月28日正式以搶先體驗（Early Access）形式登陸 Steam，並支援官方中文。遊戲原價為HK$ 99.00/新台幣358元，首週折後為HK$ 89.10 /322元

✅ 22 Dec, 2020 @ 9:21am
Right Back At Ya

✅ 29 Dec, 2020 @ 11:23pm
The World
Complete the main storyline.
Breathtaking
Collect all items that once belonged to Johnny Silverhand.
It's Elementary
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Watson.
I Am The Law
Complete all Cyberpsycho Sightings.
Greetings from Pacifica!
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Pacifica.
The Wasteland
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in the Badlands.
Little Tokyo
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Westbrook.
Mean Streets
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Heywood.
The Jungle
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Santo Domingo.
City Lights
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in City Center.
Full Body Conversion
Install at least one implant in each system and body part.
Gun Fu
Kill or incapacitate 3 enemies in quick succession with a revolver or pistol in close combat.
Christmas Tree Attack
Complete a Breach Protocol with a minimum of 3 daemons uploaded.
Ten out of Ten
Reach the max level in any skill.
Gunslinger
Shoot an enemy grenade in midair with a revolver.
Two Heads, One Bullet
Kill or incapacitate 2 enemies with the same sniper rifle shot.
Rough Landing
While Berserk cyberware is active, perform a Superhero Landing to kill or incapacitate 2 enemies.
Stanislavski's Method
Use a dialogue option related to V's life path 10 times.
Autojock
Buy all vehicles available for purchase.
Master Crafter
Craft 3 Legendary items.
Daemon In The Shell
Kill or incapacitate 3 enemies with one &quot;Detonate Grenade&quot; quickhack.
The Quick and the Dead
Kill or incapacitate 50 enemies while time is slowed.
Must Be Rats
Perform the Distract Enemies quickhack 30 times without drawing attention to yourself.
V for Vendetta
After reviving with Second Heart, kill or incapacitate the enemy who killed you within 5 seconds.
True Soldier
Kill or incapacitate 300 enemies using ranged weapons.
True Warrior
Kill or incapacitate 100 enemies using melee weapons.
The Wandering Fool
Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
Frequent Flyer
Find all fast travel dataterms.
Legend of The Afterlife
Reach max Street Cred.
All the President's Men
Save President Myers.
Dirty Deeds
Complete every Gig in Dogtown.
Judgement Day
Eliminate three bosses from the &quot;Increased criminal activity&quot; category.
Easy Come, Easy Go
Steal the Arasaka medical truck or deliver 10 vehicles to El Capitan.
Relic Ruler
Unlock all Perks in the Relic Perk tree.
The APB is Not Enough
Become Dogtown's most wanted criminal.
20 hidden achievements remaining
Details for each achievement will be revealed once unlocked

Huey Tlatoani

Playing as Kongo, have a capital city with a population of 30
Viking Raid

Missed That Day in History Class

Playing as Scythia have 10 Saka Horse Archers in your army

Have 10 Shopping Malls in your civilization at the same time
Desperate Times Call For Desperate Measures

Frenemy
Gain control of an Ally's city after it becomes disloyal, and choose to keep it
Elcano's Revenge

When Diplomacy Fails

A Man A Plan A Canal Panama
Build the Panama Canal as Teddy Roosevelt
Surprise Attack

Seahenge
Have Stonehenge become submerged due to Coastal Flooding
Rock God
Have no cities following your religion then convert a city to your religion using a Rock Band unit
Nobel-er than the Noblest
Achieve first place in all three Nobel Prizes in the same game
Airing Your Grievances

Peacekeeper
As Wilfrid Laurier, successfully complete an Emergency
Shield of Christianity
As Hungary, have Christianity as your dominant religion and defeat a unit whose Civilization's dominant religion is not Christianity
Po-tay-toes!
As Pachacuti, construct a Terrace Farm that is adjacent to 2 Aqueducts and 4 Mountains
One does not simply walk into Ngauruhoe
As the Maori, have a Maori Toa discover the Ngauruhoe volcano

Purple Reign
As Dido, complete the Move Capital project on 4 different continents
Nobody's Business But the Turks
As the Ottomans, capture another Civilization's capital and then rename it
Smörgåsbord
As Kristina, at the start of a turn have cities in five different terrain types (Snow, Tundra, Desert, Plains and Grassland) and have Open Air Museums in all of them
Meet the New Boss, Same as the Old Boss
As Eleanor, gain a city to loyalty that was owned by a different civilization with Eleanor as its leader
Let Our Powers Combine – Wait Heart is Missing!
Have a city with a Wind Farm, Solar Farm, Hydroelectric Dam, and Geothermal Plant
Toward Carbon Neutrality
Complete the Carbon Recapture project 10 times during a single game
Future is Now
Be the first to complete all the technologies in the Future Era in a game with 8 or more players
And the Walls Kept Tumbling Down
Have your Roman city lose 6 population from one Vesuvius eruption

Win the Black Death as England

Win the Black Death as France

Win the Black Death as Castile

Hello Cleveland!

The Good Die Young

The stars are right

El Libertador

Court of Itzamna
As the Maya found a settlement adjacent to 4 luxury resources.
To plow the sea

I'll melt with you

The end of the world as we know it
Be the last person standing after comets begin falling.
The accursed share
Use a max-promotions Soothsayer to sacrifice a max-promotions GDR.
Ashes of Time
Wanderers - Explore 30 city ruins across multiple games.
Experience Is Everything
Preppers - Have 5 units earn 5 promotions across multiple games.
It's Alive!
Mad Scientists - Heal 1000 health points across multiple games.
Hope Springs Eternal

From the Outer Darkness
Mutants - Attack a unit outside the Red Death while inside the Red Death 20 times.
Getting Pruney
Pirates - Spend 50 turns in the water across multiple games.
U mad, bro?
Borderlords - Trick enemy factions into triggering Grieving Gifts 5 times across multiple games.
It Hungers
Cultists - Kill 10 units with the Undying Eye.
NERDS!
Jocks - Use Hail Marys to wound, but not kill, 5 Civilians across multiple games.
They're coming to get you, Barbara
Zombie Beastmasters - Spawn 30 Zombie Hordes through combat kills.
Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Aliens - Attack while cloaked 20 times.
The Lion of Judah
Win a regular game as Menelik II.
Battle of Adwa
Defeat an Infantry unit whose capital is on another continent with an Oromo Cavalry.
The Mask of Baphomet
Earn all Governor promotions for the Owls of Minerva Secret Society.
Voice of Aiwass
Earn all Governor promotions for the Hermetic Order Secret Society.
Dead But Dreaming
Earn all Governor promotions for the Voidsingers Secret Society.
One Eye in One Hundred
Win a regular game as Basil II.
Et tu, Gallia?
Win a regular game as Ambiorix.
Rome is Where the Heart is
As Byzantium, take the original capital of Rome while it is following your founded religion.
Crom Laughs at Your Tanks
As Gaul, kill a Tank with a Gaesatae.
Things Fall Apart
In Dramatic Ages Mode, lose 4 or more cities by entering a Dark Age.
The City Ever-Shining
In Dramatic Ages Mode, enter a Golden Age with an excess 20 Era Score
No Light Without the Dark
In Dramatic Age Mode, as Georgia, have simultaneously a Golden and a Dark Policy active.
The Abyss is Hungry
Dread Pirate - Sink 10 ships while using Walk the Plank across multiple games.
Naval Supremacy
Privateer - Ensure that your patron has a naval fleet twice the size of any other colonial power.
Port in Every Storm
Swashbuckler - Visit the tavern of 10 ports in a single game.
Love It When a Plan Comes Together
Hoarder - Sink or capture a treasure ship while a treasure escort is locked by a chainshot.
I am a Pirate King!
Win the Pirates scenario.
Forced Retirement
Lose the Pirates scenario due to mutiny.
Liquid Assets
Sink or capture a treasure ship.
Mine! Mine! Mine!
Win the Pirates scenario using mostly Treasure Points.
I am Kind of a Big Deal
Win the Pirates scenario using mostly Infamous Pirate Points.
I Want You to Hit Me as Hard as You Can
Win the Pirates scenario using mostly Fightin' Points.
Babylon Rocker
Win a regular game as Hammurabi.
Let's Do the Time Warp Again
As Babylon, earn 5 tech boosts for techs that are at least one era later than your current era.
Sing, O Muse
Claim every Hero across multiple games.
Clash of the Titans
Kill an enemy Hero with your Hero.
The Brave Live Forever
Recall a Hero 5 times in a single game.
Steel-Driving Man
Recall a Hero after the Industrial Era.
The Dream Team
Claim 5 Heroes in a single game.
I will not bend my back
Win a regular game as Bà Triệu.
For he on honey-dew hath fed
Win a regular game as Kublai Khan.
Top Hat and Monocle
Control a 100% Monopoly on a given Luxury Resource on a Standard sized map or larger.
Jack of all Trades, Master of None
Win a game on a Standard sized map or larger with 5 or more Industries, but no Corporations.
Robber Baron
Control 5 Luxury Resource Monopolies at once on a Standard sized map or larger.
Limited Edition
Hire a unique unit from a Barbarian Clan.
Finder's Fee
Ransom 5 units from Barbarian Clans in a single game.
Frenemies
Hire, Bribe, Incite, and Raid the same Barbarian Clan.
The Spice Must Flow
Win a regular game as João III.
Ultramar Português
As Portugal, have a Trading Post in cities belonging to Brazil, India, and Japan.
Re-Animator
Control at least 20 Zombie units at the start of your turn.
Well Hello Mr. Fancypants
Destroy a Zombie unit that has +50 or more Mutation Strength.
It's a Trap!!!
Deal 50 or more damage to a single unit from trap damage on a single tile in one turn.
Salad Sensation
Win a regular game as Julius Caesar
Addressing Gettysburg
Win a regular game as Abraham Lincoln
The Self-Made Throne
Win a regular game as Nzinga Mbande
I Will Wait
Win a regular game as Tokugawa
Claimants of the Peacock Throne
Win a regular game as Nader Shah
Live Yongle Reaction
Win a regular game as Yongle
Mother’s Day
Win a regular game as Wu Zetian
Valley of Kings
Win a regular game as Ramses II
Dawn of a Dynasty
Win a regular game as Sundiata Keita
Father of Korean Literature
Win a regular game as Sejong
Partial Completionist
Win a regular game as Ludwig II
The Power Beside the Throne
Win a regular game as Theodora
The Triumphs of Oriana
Win a regular game as Elizabeth I

Good Intentions
